headline: Grail CEO Bob Ragusa to retire
summary: Josh Ofman, company president, will step into the top job. Guggenheim Securities analysts said the leadership change “has been in development for some time and is unrelated to the NHS trial readout."

raw.headline: Grail CEO Bob Ragusa to retire
raw.summary: Josh Ofman, company president, will step into the top job. Guggenheim Securities analysts said the leadership change “has been in development for some time and is unrelated to the NHS trial readout."

headline: This Schwab ETF Holds 100 Dividend Stocks, Charges $6 a Year, and Yields More Than Most Savings Accounts
summary: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) costs $6 a year on a $10,000 investment, holds 100 dividend stocks, and currently yields 3.39%. With the Fed funds rate sitting at 3.75% and most high-yield savings accounts paying in that same neighborhood, the yield gap is narrow. But SCHD adds something a savings account never will: price ... This Schwab ETF Holds 100 Dividend Stocks, Charges $6 a Year, and Yields More Than Most Savings Accounts

headline: Is Trending Stock Amgen Inc. (AMGN) a Buy Now?
summary: Recently, Zacks.com users have been paying close attention to Amgen (AMGN). This makes it worthwhile to examine what the stock has in store.

headline: Amgen, GSK Set To Join TrumpRx Offering Deep Prescription Drug Discounts: Report
summary: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ: AMGN) and GSK plc (NYSE: GSK) are reportedly set to announce their partnership with TrumpRx.gov. This collaboration is set to offer substantial discounts on prescription drugs.
